runz.hero.title: RUNZ
runz.hero.lead: A top-down roguelite arena shooter where you draft bullets for your magazine
runz.overview.title: Your magazine is the build.
runz.overview.p1: Survive twenty rounds. Between each one, shop for bullets to draft your perfect magazine.  Manage your economy, collect different bullets, carefully adjust their order in your magazine and let your build loose on your enemies.
runz.overview.feature.0: 20-round survival (planned endless and progression in the full game)
runz.overview.feature.2: Collect 3 copies of the same bullet to upgrade it
runz.overview.feature.4: Mods that can radically change how you approach your run
runz.facts.title: Quick Facts
runz.facts.sub: Specs, links, and press copy — all copy-paste ready.
runz.facts.spec.4.dd: Steam: Windows, macOS, Linux. itch.io: HTML5, Windows, macOS, Linux.
runz.facts.spec.6.dd: Public demo available. Full game coming soon.
runz.media.title: Screenshots
runz.media.sub: Grab anything here for coverage — 1080p, straight from the demo build.
runz.creators.title: Creator Notes
runz.creators.sub: What you can do with RUNZ on stream, and what to disclose.
runz.creators.col.0.p0: Creators may stream, record, clip, review, and monetize RUNZ gameplay videos.
runz.creators.col.0.p1: No embargo is active unless we state one directly in writing.
runz.creators.col.1.p0: Build a magazine, draft a bullet "team", ala auto-"battler X twin stick shooter X deck building".
runz.creators.col.2.p0: If you receive a free key or early build, please disclose that connection according to your platform and local rules.
runz.downloads.title: Downloads
runz.downloads.sub: The kit ZIP, paste-ready pitch text, and a factsheet.
runz.downloads.kit.p: The ZIP bundles the RUNZ icon, splash image, demo badge, and a full set of high-res screenshots.
runz.downloads.kit.li.2: Steam, itch.io, Discord, YouTube, and TikTok links
runz.downloads.kit.li.3: Copy-paste pitch, facts, and creator permission
runz.downloads.copy.0.label: One Sentence
runz.downloads.copy.0.text: RUNZ is a top-down roguelite arena shooter where every bullet in your magazine matters.
runz.downloads.copy.1.label: Short Description
runz.downloads.copy.1.text: Blast through escalating waves, earn money, reroll the shop, combine 3-of-a-kind bullets,.
runz.downloads.copy.2.label: Genre Line
runz.downloads.copy.2.text: Top-down roguelite arena shooter with shop and economy driven magazine builds and synergy building.
runz.downloads.copy.3.label: Creator Permission
runz.downloads.copy.3.text: Creators may stream, record, clip, review, and monetize RUNZ gameplay videos.
runz.footer.meta: Last updated June 22, 2026 · RUNZ is developed and published by sardin-ventures.

ohjata.hero.title: OHJATA
ohjata.hero.lead: Redirect your weapon, collect upgrades, gather gems, and push deeper into a volcanic map.
ohjata.overview.title: A redirect-first survivors-like.
ohjata.overview.p1: Ohjata is a released Action/Indie game built around a unique redirect mechanic: steer your projectile through the arena instead of just firing it.
ohjata.overview.p2: Upgrades, synergies, gems, and a hand-crafted volcanic map turn each attempt into a different shape — and each death into a choice about what to risk.
ohjata.features.title: Steam Features
ohjata.features.sub: Feature names follow the official Steam page.
ohjata.features.col.0.p: Master the weapon redirect mechanic, improve it during a run, and avoid losing the projectile to walls or off-screen reloads.
ohjata.features.col.1.p: Level-up choices can reshape a build through weapon upgrades, stat buffs, synergies, random events, and relics.
ohjata.features.col.2.p: Gems can be gathered during runs, spent on powerful mods, dropped on death, and recovered or secured through deposit boxes.
ohjata.features.col.3.p: Explore a volcanic landscape, push through harder eras, solve puzzles, read lore, and search for secret bosses.
ohjata.media.title: Screenshots
ohjata.footer.meta: OHJATA is developed by Paul Sardin & Théo Sardin.
